app.title: Dingovault
app.emptyTitle: This page is waiting for your ideas
app.emptySubtitle: Open another note from the palette, or create blocks on this page — every bullet is a first-class outline node.
app.emptyCtaBody: Press Ctrl+K (⌘K) to jump anywhere instantly.
app.hint: Ctrl+K palette · Tab / Shift+Tab indent · Cmd+Enter TODO cycle · / commands · Enter at end adds sibling · drag ⠿ to reorder · fold ▾ · checkboxes multi-select · mobile: swipe ← TODO · → clear
app.aboutBody: Local-first outliner with Markdown blocks, FTS search, and optional cloud sync. See the repository README for setup, SaaS mode, and security notes.

palette.placeholder: Jump to page or search blocks…
palette.emptyRecents: Open a page to build history — recents appear here.
palette.emptySearchHint: Try a shorter keyword, check spelling, or open a page from recents (clear the search box).

backlinks.title: Linked references
backlinks.empty: No other pages link here yet.
backlinks.emptyHint: When another note links to this page with [[wikilinks]], those references show up here.

semantic.title: Semantically related
semantic.empty: No strong semantic matches on other pages yet. Index embeddings and try again.

outline.aiPlaceholder: e.g. Summarize this bullet, fix grammar, translate to Japanese…
outline.aiConnectionLost: Connection lost — check that your AI server is running, then try again.

aiChat.title: AI Chat
aiChat.ragHint: Uses this page plus similar blocks across the vault (current: {path})
aiChat.systemPromptPlaceholder: Instructions for the assistant when answering with vault context…
aiChat.placeholder: Ask about this page… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
aiChat.disableEmbeddings: Disable background embeddings (lighter on CPU / GPU)
